debug_info.goal:
E : Type u_1

inst✝⁹ : Module ℝ F
inst✝⁸ : TopologicalSpace F
F' : Type u_3
inst✝⁷ : AddCommGroup F'
inst✝⁶ : Module ℝ F'
inst✝⁵ : TopologicalSpace F'
n k : ℕ∞
inst✝⁴ : IsTopologicalAddGroup F
inst✝³ : ContinuousSMul ℝ F
inst✝² : IsTopologicalAddGroup F'
inst✝¹ : ContinuousSMul ℝ F'
inst✝ : FiniteDimensional ℝ E
T : @Distribution E inst✝¹² inst✝¹¹ Ω F inst✝¹⁰ inst✝⁹ inst✝⁸ ⊤
⊢ ∀ (m : ℝ) (x : TestFunction Ω ℝ ⊤),
    {
        toFun := fun v =>
          (@DFunLike.coe
              (@Distribution E inst✝¹² inst✝¹¹ Ω F inst✝¹⁰ inst✝⁹ inst✝⁸ ⊤ →L[ℝ]
                @Distribution E inst✝¹² inst✝¹¹ Ω F inst✝¹⁰ inst✝⁹ inst✝⁸ ⊤)
              (@Distribution E inst✝¹² inst✝¹¹ Ω F inst✝¹⁰ inst✝⁹ inst✝⁸ ⊤)
              (fun x => @Distribution E inst✝¹² inst✝¹¹ Ω F inst✝¹⁰ inst✝⁹ inst✝⁸ ⊤) ContinuousLinearMap.funLike
              (@Distribution.lineDerivCLM E inst✝¹² inst✝¹¹ Ω F inst✝¹⁰ inst✝⁹ inst✝⁸ inst✝⁴ inst✝³ v) T)
            (m • x),
        map_add' := ⋯, map_smul' := ⋯, cont := ⋯ } =
      (RingHom.id ℝ) m •
        {
          toFun := fun v =>
            (@DFunLike.coe
                (@Distribution E inst✝¹² inst✝¹¹ Ω F inst✝¹⁰ inst✝⁹ inst✝⁸ ⊤ →L[ℝ]
                  @Distribution E inst✝¹² inst✝¹¹ Ω F inst✝¹⁰ inst✝⁹ inst✝⁸ ⊤)
                (@Distribution E inst✝¹² inst✝¹¹ Ω F inst✝¹⁰ inst✝⁹ inst✝⁸ ⊤)
                (fun x => @Distribution E inst✝¹² inst✝¹¹ Ω F inst✝¹⁰ inst✝⁹ inst✝⁸ ⊤) ContinuousLinearMap.funLike
                (@Distribution.lineDerivCLM E inst✝¹² inst✝¹¹ Ω F inst✝¹⁰ inst✝⁹ inst✝⁸ inst✝⁴ inst✝³ v) T)
              x,
          map_add' := ⋯, map_smul' := ⋯, cont := ⋯ }
